name: Iteration story card surfaces the checker's failure evidence
description: Opening the story card of an iteration that failed shows an evidence block with the cloud run id, the root cause from the failure bundle, and the fix target; iterations without failures show no evidence block.

planSteps.description: Click the ring arc segment for iteration 2

Verify the detail card below the ring contains an evidence section separated by a top border, showing a run id line, a root-cause sentence mentioning the arc segments not being exposed as interactive, and a 'fix target' line
Click the ring arc segment for iteration 2 again to close the card, then click the segment for iteration 4
Verify the detail card for iteration 4 shows PASS and contains no evidence section
